- [ ] This has not been proposed before

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe from your own experience.
     What clinical workflow or radiologist need would this address?
     "It would be useful" is not enough - explain the actual problem. -->

<!-- What specifically should be added or changed?
     Include skill name if proposing new skill.
     Be concrete about the expected behavior. -->

## What alternatives did you consider?

<!-- Other approaches evaluated?
     Why is this better than the alternatives? -->

## Is this appropriate for clinical-skills core?

<!-- Would this benefit radiology AI broadly?
     Or is it too specialized for your institution?
     Consider: publish as separate plugin for very specialized needs -->
